Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO LOCAL GOVERNMENTS
REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Authorizes the town of Niagara to alienate and discontinue the use of certain parklands and to convey such parklands to David Gaines
Summary: Authorizes the town of Niagara to alienate and discontinue the use of certain parklands and to convey such parklands to David Gaines.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing the town of Niagara to alienate and discontinue the use of certain parklands and to convey such parklands to David Gaines
